commands.name: server-typescript
commands.command: Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false; Pop-Location

commands.name: phase-static-scans
commands.command: Scanned server/src/engine/flows/flow-extension-engine for throw new, service-base inheritance, nestjs-cls imports, direct tenant-context references, direct SDK imports, and any usage.
notes: The one tenant-context reference is a DNA rule description string in dna-compliance-checker.service.ts, not a direct import or runtime access.
